fields.name: name
fields.description: A human-readable identifier for the gauge.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation of the gauge's purpose or meaning.

fields.name: threshold
fields.description: The value at which an alert or action is triggered.

fields.description: Timestamp of the last compaction event.
